    |m * ((m ^ m - 1) / (m - 1))| = |∑ i ∈ A, (∑ k : Fin m, if i ∈ B k then 1 else 0) * i| := by rw [← h1]
    _ ≤ ∑ i ∈ A, |(∑ k : Fin m, if i ∈ B k then 1 else 0) * i| := h7
    _ ≤ ∑ i ∈ A, m * |i| := Finset.sum_le_sum h8
    _ = m * ∑ i ∈ A, |i| := by simp [Finset.mul_sum]
  have h11 : m * ((m ^ m - 1) / (m - 1)) ≥ 0 := by
    apply mul_nonneg
    · exact Nat.cast_nonneg m
    · apply div_nonneg
      · apply sub_nonneg_of_le
        exact Nat.one_le_pow _ _ (by linarith)
      · apply Nat.cast_nonneg
  rw [abs_of_nonneg h11] at this
  have h12 : ∑ i ∈ A, |i| ≥ #A := by
    have h13 : ∀ i ∈ A, |i| ≥ 1 := by
      intro i hi
      cases' abs_cases i with h14 h14 <;> omega
    calc
      ∑ i ∈ A, |i| ≥ ∑ i ∈ A, 1 := Finset.sum_le_sum h13
      _ = #A := by simp
  calc
    m * ((m ^ m - 1) / (m - 1)) ≤ m * ∑ i ∈ A, |i| := this
    _ ≥ m * #A := by gcongr
  have h14 : (m : ℚ) / 2 ≤ #A := by
    apply le_of_mul_le_mul_left _ (by positivity)
    norm_cast
    nlinarith [pow_pos (by linarith : 0 < m) m]
  exact h14

have h1 : ∀ k : Fin m, (∑ i in B k, i : ℚ) = m ^ (k + 1) := by
    intro k
    exact_mod_cast hB k
  have h2 : ∑ k : Fin m, (∑ i in B k, i : ℚ) = ∑ k : Fin m, (m : ℚ) ^ (k + 1) := by
    exact Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun k _ => h1 k)
  have h3 : ∑ k : Fin m, (∑ i in B k, i : ℚ) = ∑ i in A, (∑ k in Finset.filter (fun k => i ∈ B k) Finset.univ, (1 : ℚ)) * i := by
    rw [Finset.sum_comm]
    simp [Finset.sum_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and]
  have h4 : ∑ k : Fin m, (m : ℚ) ^ (k + 1) = m * (m ^ m - 1) / (m - 1) := by
    rw [← geom_sum_mul]
    simp [geom_sum_eq, hm]
  have h5 : ∑ i in A, (∑ k in Finset.filter (fun k => i ∈ B k) Finset.univ, (1 : ℚ)) * i ≥ ∑ i in A, (∑ k in Finset.filter (fun k => i ∈ B k) Finset.univ, (1 : ℚ)) * (-1) := by
    apply Finset.sum_le_sum
    intro i _
    have h6 : (∑ k in Finset.filter (fun k => i ∈ B k) Finset.univ, (1 : ℚ)) ≥ 0 := by
      apply Finset.sum_nonneg
      intro k _
      exact zero_le_one
    nlinarith
  have h7 : ∑ i in A, (∑ k in Finset.filter (fun k => i ∈ B k) Finset.univ, (1 : ℚ)) * (-1) = -∑ i in A, (∑ k in Finset.filter (fun k => i ∈ B k) Finset.univ, (1 : ℚ)) := by
    simp [Finset.sum_neg_distrib]
  have h8 : ∑ i in A, (∑ k in Finset.filter (fun k => i ∈ B k) Finset.univ, (1 : ℚ)) = ∑ k : Fin m, (B k).card := by
    rw [Finset.sum_comm]
    simp [Finset.sum_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and]
  have h9 : ∑ k : Fin m, (B k).card ≤ m * A.card := by
    calc
      ∑ k : Fin m, (B k).card = ∑ k : Fin m, (B k).card := rfl
      _ ≤ ∑ k : Fin m, A.card := Finset.sum_le_sum fun k _ => Finset.card_le_of_subset (hBA k)
      _ = m * A.card := by simp [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
  have h10 : (m : ℚ) * (m ^ m - 1) / (m - 1) ≥ 0 := by
    apply div_nonneg
    · apply mul_nonneg
      · exact_mod_cast Nat.cast_nonneg m
      · exact sub_nonneg.mpr (by exact_mod_cast Nat.one_le_pow m m (by linarith))
    · exact sub_nonneg.mpr (by exact_mod_cast hm)
  have h11 : (m : ℚ) / 2 ≤ A.card := by
    nlinarith [h2, h3, h4, h5, h7, h8, h9, h10]
  exact h11

have h₁ : ∀ i, (B i).card ≤ A.card := fun i => Finset.card_le_card (hBA i)
  have h₂ : ∑ k : Fin m, ∑ i ∈ B k, i = ∑ k : Fin m, (m : ℤ) ^ (k + 1) := by
    simp_rw [hB]
  have h₃ : ∑ k : Fin m, (m : ℤ) ^ (k + 1) = m * ((m ^ m - 1) / (m - 1)) := by
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ']
    simp [pow_succ]
    rw [← geom_sum_eq]
    · ring
    · exact sub_ne_zero_of_ne (by linarith)
  have h₄ : ∑ k : Fin m, ∑ i ∈ B k, i ≤ ∑ k : Fin m, (B k).card * A.card := by
    apply Finset.sum_le_sum
    intro k _
    exact Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul _ _ (fun x _ => by norm_cast; linarith)
  have h₅ : ∑ k : Fin m, (B k).card * A.card = (∑ k : Fin m, (B k).card) * A.card := by
    simp [Finset.sum_mul]
  have h₆ : ∑ k : Fin m, (B k).card ≥ m := by
    calc
      ∑ k : Fin m, (B k).card ≥ ∑ k : Fin m, 1 := by
        apply Finset.sum_le_sum
        intro k _
        exact Nat.succ_le_iff.mpr (Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr (by
          intro h
          rw [h] at hB
          simp at hB
          have := hB k
          norm_cast at this
          omega))
      _ = m := by simp
  have h₇ : (m : ℤ) * ((m ^ m - 1) / (m - 1)) ≤ (∑ k : Fin m, (B k).card) * A.card := by
    linarith
  have h₈ : (m : ℚ) / 2 ≤ A.card := by
    norm_cast
    apply le_of_sub_nonneg
    field_simp
    rw [le_div_iff]
    · nlinarith
    · positivity
  exact h₈

have h₁ : (∑ k : Fin m, ∑ i ∈ B k, i) = ∑ k : Fin m, (m : ℤ) ^ (k + 1) := by
    simp_all [hB]
  have h₂ : ∑ k : Fin m, (m : ℤ) ^ (k + 1) = ∑ k in Finset.range m, (m : ℤ) ^ (k + 1) := by
    simp [Finset.sum_fin_eq_sum_range]
  rw [h₁, h₂] at *
  have h₃ : ∑ k in Finset.range m, (m : ℤ) ^ (k + 1) = m * ((m ^ m - 1) / (m - 1)) := by
    -- Geometric series sum formula
    have h₄ : m ≠ 1 := by linarith
    have h₅ : ∑ k in Finset.range m, (m : ℤ) ^ (k + 1) = m * ∑ k in Finset.range m, (m : ℤ) ^ k := by
      simp [Finset.mul_sum, pow_succ]
    rw [h₅, geom_sum_eq (by norm_cast; linarith)]
    field_simp [h₄]
  rw [h₃] at *
  clear h₁ h₂ h₃
  have h₄ : ∀ k : Fin m, (B k).card ≤ A.card := by
    intro k
    exact Finset.card_le_card (hBA k)
  have h₅ : ∑ k : Fin m, (B k).card ≤ ∑ k : Fin m, A.card := by
    exact Finset.sum_le_sum fun k _ => h₄ k
  simp at h₅
  have h₆ : ∑ k : Fin m, ∑ i ∈ B k, i ≤ ∑ k : Fin m, (B k).card * (A.sup' (by aesop) id) := by
    sorry
  sorry

have h1 : ∑ k : Fin m, ∑ i ∈ B k, i = ∑ k : Fin m, (m : ℤ) ^ (k + 1) := by
    exact Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun k _ => by simpa using hB k)
  have h2 : ∑ k : Fin m, (m : ℤ) ^ (k + 1) = ∑ k in Finset.range m, (m : ℤ) ^ (k + 1) := by
    simp [Finset.sum_fin_eq_sum_range]
  rw [h1, h2] at *
  have h3 : ∑ k in Finset.range m, (m : ℤ) ^ (k + 1) = m * ((m ^ m - 1) / (m - 1)) := by
    have h4 : m ≠ 1 := by linarith
    have h5 : ∑ k in Finset.range m, (m : ℤ) ^ (k + 1) = ∑ k in Finset.range m, (m : ℤ) * (m : ℤ) ^ k := by
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
      intro k hk
      ring
    rw [h5, Finset.mul_sum]
    have h6 : ∑ k in Finset.range m, (m : ℤ) ^ k = (m ^ m - 1) / (m - 1) := by
      rw [geom_sum_eq]
      all_goals norm_cast
      all_goals linarith
    rw [h6]
    ring
  rw [h3] at *
  have h7 : ∑ k : Fin m, ∑ i ∈ B k, i ≤ ∑ k : Fin m, ∑ i ∈ A, 1 := by
    apply Finset.sum_le_sum
    intro k _
    have h8 : B k ⊆ A := hBA k
    have h9 : ∑ i ∈ B k, i ≤ ∑ i ∈ B k, 1 := by
      apply Finset.sum_le_sum
      intro i hi
      have h10 : i ∈ A := h8 hi
      have h11 : (i : ℤ) ≤ 1 := by
        nlinarith [hBA k hi]
      exact_mod_cast h11
    simpa using h9
  have h8 : ∑ k : Fin m, ∑ i ∈ A, 1 = m * A.card := by
    simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin]
  rw [h8] at h7
  have h9 : (m : ℤ) * ((m ^ m - 1) / (m - 1)) ≤ m * A.card := by
    linarith
  have h10 : (m : ℚ) / 2 ≤ A.card := by
    cases m with
    | zero => contradiction
    | succ m =>
      cases m with
      | zero => contradiction
      | succ m =>
        norm_cast at h9
        apply le_of_sub_nonneg
        field_simp
        rw [le_div_iff]
        all_goals norm_cast
        all_goals nlinarith
  exact h10
